message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classBorderThickness 1
skinparam classPadding 5
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderPadding 5
skinparam classHeaderMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeAlignment left
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal
skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classAttributeFontName Arial
skinparam classMethodFontName Arial
skinparam classAttributePadding 2
skinparam classMethodPadding 2
skinparam classAttributeMargin 0
skinparam classMethodMargin 0
skinparam classAttributeBorderThickness 0
skinparam classMethodBorderThickness 0
skinparam classAttributeBorderColor #333333
skinparam classMethodBorderColor #333333
skinparam classAttributeBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classMethodBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classAttributeHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classMethodHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontSize 12
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontName Arial
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontName Arial
skinparam classAttributeHeaderPadding 2
skinparam classMethodHeaderPadding 2
skinparam classAttributeHeaderMargin 0
skinparam classMethodHeaderMargin 0
skinparam classAttributeHeaderBorderThickness 0
skinparam classMethodHeaderBorderThickness 0
skinparam classAttributeHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classMethodHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classAttributeHeaderAlignment left
skinparam classMethodHeaderAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classMethodHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontSize 12
skinparam classAttributeHeaderFontName Arial
skinparam classMethodHeaderFontName Arial
skinparam classAttributeHeaderPadding 2
skinparam classMethodHeaderPadding 2
skinparam classAttributeHeaderMargin 0
skinparam classMethodHeaderMargin 0
skinparam classAttributeHeaderBorderThickness 0
skinparam classMethodHeaderBorderThickness 0
skinparam classAttributeHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classMethodHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classAttributeHeaderAlignment left
skinparam classMethodHeaderAlignment left

class ASTNode {
    getLine(): int
    getColumn(): int
}

class Type {
}

class IntType {
}

class RealType {
}

class CharType {
}

class ArrayType {
    size: int
    type: Type
}

class VoidType {
}

class FunctionType {
    params: List<VarDef>
    returnType: Type
}

class StructType {
    fields: List<StructField>
}

class StructField {
    name: String
    type: Type
}

ASTNode <|-- Type
ASTNode <|-- StructField
Type <|-- IntType
Type <|-- RealType
Type <|-- CharType
Type <|-- ArrayType
Type <|-- VoidType
Type <|-- FunctionType
Type <|-- StructType
StructType o-- StructField
@enduml
